The Carry On Continues

You must remember weddings where bride and groom
Photographers and guests

����and kids and booze
����(and some old geezer having a quick snooze);

Wedding cakes, all that paraphernalia
Jostled for space


����with a few muttered words
����and a kiss

And the long years after to rue the fact.


Thank God the whole performance has been streamlined now

����four minutes, four words on the dotted line
����"I am yours and you are mine"
����no regrets - yet - and the scene all set

For a quick divorce.




writing
